overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a high-rise apartment bedroom in a cyberpunk metropolis, looking out a large window at the skyline during golden hour. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window in this game engine footage, likely from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

multiple flying vehicles visible in the distance outside the window
another flying vehicle cruises past the window

agents.ego_description: stationary in the apartment, gazing out at the cityscape through the window

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window framing the city view with dark metal frame
bed with rumpled white sheets and pillows in the foreground
dark brick wall with various items and shelves mounted on it
rectangular overhead light fixture emitting warm artificial light
tall cylindrical skyscraper with distinctive stacked architecture visible through the window
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with glowing signs and billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed inside a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom, looking out through a large panoramic window at a sprawling futuristic city during golden hour. The unmade bed sits in the foreground while flying vehicles occasionally cruise past the window, silhouetted against the warm sunset sky and the towering mega-structures of the distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze from the intimacy of a dimly lit bedroom toward the vast, glowing expanse of a cyberpunk metropolis at golden hour. It begins focused on the interior stillness of the room, where an unmade bed sits in the foreground against the backdrop of a large panoramic window. As the eye drifts toward the horizon, the view expands to reveal a sprawling futuristic skyline dominated by towering mega-structures. The scene then becomes dynamic as flying vehicles cruise past the glass, their silhouettes cutting through the warm, amber light of the sunset. Finally, the camera lingers on the contrast between the quiet apartment and the humming, high-tech city stretching into the distance.
